msg: fix: always answer KB questions fully, per-message language detection, rep call CTA

add /chat endpoint and bump version to v4.2-chat
fix: resolve infinite name loop by treating 'WhatsApp Lead' as fulfilled

feat: implement P0 stability fixes (Heartbeat, Fail-Fast, Retries)
fix(session): fix state machine greeting loop and ensure persist per user
feat: add meta webhook handling directly to chatbot
fix: use process.env.PORT for Railway compatibility
fix: remove SURGERY_CITY + INSURANCE from KB allowed states — prevent double-reply data corruption
feat: switch backend URLs from Render → Railway
chore: retrigger deploy — fix render internal system error on 13bc428
Update knowledge allowed states and add timeline handling
fix: raise name validation to 3 chars, require at least one 3-char word
fix: remove 15s forced cold-start wait — causes chatbot timeout on every API call
fix: point API_URL to Render backend, increase wake delay to 15s
chore: force redeploy for final verification
